channel.title: Joris Berns
channel.description: Joris Berns — Assistant Professor in Organization Studies, Tilburg University. Research on executive communication, behavioral decision-making, and corporate governance.

item.title: A new home on the web
item.description:
Welcome to the relaunched version of this site, now built with Quarto and deployed automatically via GitHub Actions. The previous version served me well through the PhD years, but a research program built on computational text and audio analysis deserves a website that is itself reproducible: every page is plain text under version control, and publications, talks, and resources live in simple data files.

Expect occasional posts here on research methods — computational text analysis, paraverbal measurement, working with the Snellius supercomputer — alongside announcements of new papers and code releases.
